title: Sphaeropteris inaequalis
taxonomy: Sphaeropteris inaequalis is a species of fern in the family Cyathea. It belongs to the genus Sphaeropteris, which is a type of tree fern. The plant is native to New Caledonia and is a part of the larger family of ferns known as Cyatheaceae. The classification of Sphaeropteris inaequalis includes its kingdom as Plantae, followed by the division Pteridophyta, and then the class Polypodiopsida. It further belongs to the order Cyatheales and the family Cyathea.
